purpose: Freeze the first bounded constitutional chain prefix so law, freeze, accepted epoch, and authority cannot be advanced, substituted, or inferred by projection freshness.
frozen_scope: artifact-0005 minimum governed object chain prefix
dominance_rule: The active chain prefix may be cited by projections but may not be advanced, rewound, renamed, replaced, omitted, or expanded by projection.
refusal_rule: If a claim depends on frozen authority but freeze-object-0001 or authority-object-0001 is absent, stale, ambiguous, substituted, or contradicted, ADMISSORIUM and SDKs must refuse rather than infer authority.
forbidden_reads: README authority language presented as frozen authority
package version presented as frozen authority
Git tag presented as frozen authority
host deployment freshness presented as frozen authority
ADMISSORIUM report presented as frozen authority
status page presented as frozen authority
